title: Generation Config
description: Authoritative version pin baked into a materialized AI-generated pack's manifest under `manifest.generation`. Reproducibility today depends on `GenerationRequest.seed` plus `GeneratedFaction.notes.providerId`/`promptHash`/`modelHint` — but the orchestrator semver, prompt-template version, and ruleset-version pin are not recorded. Two regenerations from the same prompt+seed can diverge if the orchestrator was upgraded between runs. This record fixes that: every materialized pack now carries the orchestrator/prompt-template/ruleset triple it was produced with, so bug reports can be tied to a specific combination and regression tests can detect drift caused by orchestrator updates.

orchestratorVersion.description: Semver of the AI-generation orchestrator that produced this pack. Stable across releases.

promptTemplateHash.description: sha256 hex digest of the prompt-template file the orchestrator used at build time. The system prompt is a templated artifact, not free input — pinning its hash captures the contract the model was trained against.

rulesetHash.description: sha256 hex digest of `research/deep-research-report.md` at orchestrator-build time. Captures the corridor and balance contract the orchestrator targeted.
